title: libguestfs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.54.0-11.0.1]
- Add btrfs-progs to the packages installed in the appliance [Orabug: 34137448]
- Replace upstream references from a description tag
- Fix build on Oracle Linux [Orabug: 29319324]
- Set DISTRO_ORACLE_LINUX correspeonding to ol

[1:1.54.0-11]
- Ignore blank disks in Windows drive mapping
  resolves: RHEL-108803

[1:1.54.0-9]
- Generate correct osinfo for SLES >= 15
  resolves: RHEL-95791
full_text:
[1.54.0-11.0.1]
- Add btrfs-progs to the packages installed in the appliance [Orabug: 34137448]
- Replace upstream references from a description tag
- Fix build on Oracle Linux [Orabug: 29319324]
- Set DISTRO_ORACLE_LINUX correspeonding to ol

[1:1.54.0-11]
- Ignore blank disks in Windows drive mapping
  resolves: RHEL-108803

[1:1.54.0-9]
- Generate correct osinfo for SLES >= 15
  resolves: RHEL-95791

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20650-0.html
